global.description: The ad features a vibrant orange background with a product display and promotional text.
global.main_message: Promoting a flash sale with free shipping on orders over €25.

elements.label: Solid color background
elements.description: A warm orange background fills the entire canvas, providing a vibrant base for the ad.

elements.label: LuxShelf logo
elements.description: A simple logo featuring the text 'LuxShelf' in a bold, modern font, positioned at the top of the ad.

elements.label: Product display
elements.description: A stylized representation of three product boxes with transparent fronts, showcasing their contents.

elements.label: Small circle icon
elements.description: A small circular icon, possibly representing a product feature, located near the product display.

elements.label: Small circle icon
elements.description: Another small circular icon, similar to the previous one, positioned next to the product display.

elements.label: Small rectangle icon
elements.description: A small rectangular icon, adding visual interest near the product display.

elements.label: Flash sale text
elements.description: Bold white text stating 'Flash sale live' prominently displayed in the center of the ad.

elements.label: Shipping offer text
elements.description: Smaller white text below the main sale text, reading 'Free shipping over $25'.

elements.label: Get offer button
elements.description: A prominent button at the bottom of the ad with the text 'Get offer' in bold, inviting users to take action.
elements.text_content: Flash sale live Free shipping over $25

elements.label: Price tag
elements.description: A small price tag displaying '€9.99' in a clear, readable font, located near the CTA.

elements.label: Unknown element
elements.description: An element with no clear visual representation, possibly a decorative feature.

elements.label: Unknown element
elements.description: Another element with no clear visual representation, possibly a decorative feature.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, banner, bright and modern, LuxShelf logo, flash sale text, CTA button.
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top, the product display is centered, and the CTA is at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: Flash sale live, Free shipping over $25, LuxShelf, Get offer, €9.99
